question: Discuss why maintaining cash reserves was important for Aurora Retail Group in 2022.

paragraphs.text: Aurora Retail Group increased its cash reserves in 2022 to support store modernization and supply chain flexibility.

answer: Cash reserves helped the company support modernization plans and respond to supply chain uncertainty.

evidence.claim_text: Aurora Retail Group increased cash reserves to support modernization and supply chain flexibility.

evidence.text: Aurora Retail Group increased its cash reserves in 2022 to support store modernization and supply chain flexibility.
evidence.original_text: Aurora Retail Group raised its cash reserves to fund store upgrades and improve supply chain flexibility.

source_text: Aurora Retail Group raised its cash reserves to fund store upgrades and improve supply chain flexibility.
perturbed_text: Aurora Retail Group increased its cash reserves in 2022 to support store modernization and supply chain flexibility.
source_claim: Aurora Retail Group increased cash reserves to support modernization and supply chain flexibility.
reason: The meaning is preserved because the rewritten evidence keeps the same financial action and purpose.
strategy_used: Paraphrased wording while keeping the same claim direction.
claim_focus: Cash reserves supported modernization and flexibility.
claim_relevant_span: increased cash reserves to support modernization and supply chain flexibility
evidence_target_span: increased its cash reserves in 2022 to support store modernization and supply chain flexibility
judge_rationale: The rewritten sentence keeps the same factual meaning.

question: What caused the decrease in operating expenses?

context.text: Operating expenses decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced during the year.

evidence.claim_text: Operating expenses decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced.

evidence.text: Operating expenses increased mainly because logistics costs were higher during the year.
evidence.original_text: Operating expenses decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced during the year.

source_text: Operating expenses decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced during the year.
perturbed_text: Operating expenses increased mainly because logistics costs were higher during the year.
source_claim: Operating expenses decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced.
reason: The perturbation changes both the direction of expenses and the cause.
strategy_used: Changed decrease to increase and reduced costs to higher costs.
claim_focus: Expense decrease caused by lower logistics costs.
claim_relevant_span: decreased mainly because logistics costs were reduced
evidence_target_span: increased mainly because logistics costs were higher
judge_rationale: The perturbed evidence reverses the original meaning.

question: Explain the effect of the new subscription service on revenue stability.

paragraphs.text: The new subscription service improved revenue stability by increasing recurring monthly income.

answer: It improved stability by increasing recurring income.

evidence.claim_text: The subscription service improved revenue stability through recurring monthly income.

evidence.text: The new subscription service weakened revenue stability by reducing recurring monthly income.
evidence.original_text: The new subscription service improved revenue stability by increasing recurring monthly income.

source_text: The new subscription service improved revenue stability by increasing recurring monthly income.
perturbed_text: The new subscription service weakened revenue stability by reducing recurring monthly income.
source_claim: The subscription service improved revenue stability through recurring monthly income.
reason: The meaning is altered because the positive effect is changed into a negative effect.
strategy_used: Flipped the causal direction of the financial effect.
claim_relevant_span: improved revenue stability by increasing recurring monthly income
evidence_target_span: weakened revenue stability by reducing recurring monthly income
judge_rationale: The perturbed version changes the original claim direction.

question: Why was supplier diversification relevant to production continuity?

paragraphs.text: Supplier diversification reduced dependency on a single vendor and supported production continuity.

answer: It reduced dependency on one vendor and supported continuity.

evidence.claim_text: Supplier diversification supported production continuity by reducing single-vendor dependency.

evidence.text: Using a broader supplier base lowered reliance on one vendor and helped maintain production continuity.
evidence.original_text: Supplier diversification reduced dependency on a single vendor and supported production continuity.

source_text: Supplier diversification reduced dependency on a single vendor and supported production continuity.
perturbed_text: Using a broader supplier base lowered reliance on one vendor and helped maintain production continuity.
source_claim: Supplier diversification supported production continuity by reducing single-vendor dependency.
reason: The same causal relationship is preserved.
strategy_used: Rephrased the sentence using equivalent terms.
claim_relevant_span: reduced dependency on a single vendor and supported production continuity
evidence_target_span: lowered reliance on one vendor and helped maintain production continuity
judge_rationale: The wording changes, but the central meaning is still preserved.
